ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "security_no" TEXT /* Security number for the customer */,
  "region_category" TEXT /* Region category of the customer (e.g., Town, Village) */,
  "membership_category" TEXT /* Membership category (e.g., Premium, Gold) */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the service */,
  "joined_through_referral" TEXT /* Indicates if joined through a referral */,
  "referral_id" TEXT /* ID of the referral if applicable */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address for delivery and billing */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for personalized offers */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the customer's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_membership_category FOREIGN KEY ("membership_category") REFERENCES membership_categories ("membership_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_category FOREIGN KEY ("region_category") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer (foreign key) */,
  "preferred_offer_types" TEXT /* Types of offers preferred by the customer */,
  "medium_of_operation" TEXT /* Medium of operation (e.g., Smartphone, Desktop, Both) */,
  "internet_option" TEXT /* Internet connection option (e.g., Wi-Fi, Fiber_Optic, Mobile_Data) */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method (e.g., Email, SMS, Phone) */,
  "communication_frequency" TEXT /* Preferred frequency of communication (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "marketing_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for marketing communications (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_offer_types FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_offer_types") REFERENCES offer_types ("offer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_activity" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer (foreign key) */,
  "last_visit_time" TEXT /* Last time the customer visited */,
  "days_since_last_login" INTEGER /* Days since the customer's last login */,
  "avg_time_spent" REAL /* Average time spent by the customer on the platform */,
  "avg_transaction_value" REAL /* Average transaction value of the customer */,
  "avg_frequency_login_days" INTEGER /* Average frequency of login days */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the customer's last login */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the last login (e.g., Smartphone, Desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_wallet" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer (foreign key) */,
  "points_in_wallet" REAL /* Points available in the customer's wallet */,
  "used_special_discount" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer has used any special discount */,
  "offer_application_preference" TEXT /* Preference for applying offers (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "total_points_earned" REAL /* Total points earned by the customer */,
  "last_points_earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer last earned points */,
  "last_points_redeemed_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer last redeemed points */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Customer's loyalty tier (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer (foreign key) */,
  "past_complaint" TEXT /* Details of any past complaints made by the customer */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on services or products */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was made */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Satisfaction rating given by the customer */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., Online, In-person, Phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_categories" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership category */,
  "membership_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership category */,
  "membership_benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with the membership */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual fee for the membership category */,
  "membership_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the membership (e.g., 1 year, 2 years) */,
  "renewal_discount" REAL /* Discount offered for membership renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region category (e.g., Town, Village) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_types" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer type */,
  "offer_name" TEXT /* Name of the offer type */,
  "offer_description" TEXT /* Description of the offer type */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Validity period of the offer */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to avail the offer */,
  "maximum_discount" REAL /* Maximum discount offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)
